Title: xCart — per-line validationErrors non-empty after over-stock changeQty (VCST-5234 regression guard — EXPECTED RED until fix ships)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Uses BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY (Animal Crossing). Repro shape: add qty=1 (succeeds), then changeCartItemQuantity to qty=1568 (over-stock). LINE_ITEM_ID captured via follow-up cart query (addItem.items[] is empty due to async cart-projection settle — see reference_additem_async_settle memory). The final read_back query intentionally omits cart-level validationErrors to avoid triggering CartType.validationErrors resolver which re-validates and refills CartValidationErrors, masking the bug. REGRESSION GUARD for VCST-5234: ClearValidationCache() in SaveAsync() wipes CartValidationErrors so LineItemType resolvers return isValid=true / validationErrors=[] even on an invalid line. EXPECTED TO FAIL on XCart <=3.1018.0-pr-120 until fix ships. NOTE: If changeCartItemQuantity returns itemsCount=0 the FFC gate rejected the over-stock change and per-line assertions will not probe the VCST-5234 code path in this environment (valid skip condition). The per-line FAIL is only meaningful when the line IS retained at the over-stock qty.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=get_line_id] errors[] empty
[DATA label=get_line_id] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=change_to_overstock] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_ID}}].quantity = 1568
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_ID}}].isValid = false
[COUNT label=read_back] data.cart.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_ID}}].validationErrors.length >= 1
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_ID}}].validationErrors[?errorCode=PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT].errorCode = PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] VCST-5234 regression guard — this case MUST FAIL on XCart <=3.1018.0-pr-120; PASS after fix. cart-level validationErrors intentionally omitted from read_back to isolate per-line resolver behaviour (CartType.validationErrors triggers re-validation which refills CartValidationErrors; omitting it ensures LineItemType resolvers are reading from cleared sync store — the true buggy state).
Failure_Signals: isValid=true after over-stock changeQty (PASS on broken build = silent failure); validationErrors=[] on over-stock line; LINE_ITEM_ID null capture (check get_line_id succeeded and addItem included currencyCode+cultureName); itemsCount=0 after add_item (missing currencyCode/cultureName in addItem command)

Title: xCart — cart-level validationErrors(ruleSet:default) surfaces PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT after over-stock changeQty
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Uses BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY (availableQuantity=568). Verifies that the CartType.validationErrors resolver re-validates on each read (the working path that PR #110 wired up). add qty=1, capture LINE_ITEM_ID via follow-up cart query, changeCartItemQuantity to 1568, then query cart with validationErrors(ruleSet:"default") — must contain PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT. LINE_ITEM_ID captured via cart query, not addItem response (async settle).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=get_line_id] errors[] empty
[DATA label=get_line_id] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=change_to_overstock] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_default_ruleset] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_default_ruleset] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[COUNT label=read_default_ruleset] data.cart.validationErrors.length >= 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] cart-level validationErrors(ruleSet:default) re-validates on each call; PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT must be present while line qty exceeds stock
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on change_to_overstock; validationErrors empty on over-stocked cart (re-validation broken); PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT absent; itemsCount=0 after add_item (missing currencyCode/cultureName)

Title: xCart — validationErrors(ruleSet:shipments) does NOT bleed default/item errors
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. PR #110 stated goal: per-ruleSet isolation so shipment-scope validation does not return item/quantity errors. add qty=1568 line (over-stock, default-scope error), then query cart.validationErrors(ruleSet:"shipments") — must NOT contain PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT (that belongs to default scope only). LINE_ITEM_ID via follow-up cart query.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=get_line_id] errors[] empty
[DATA label=get_line_id] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=change_to_overstock] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_shipments_ruleset] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_shipments_ruleset] data.cart.validationErrors[*?errorCode=PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT].length = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] ruleSet isolation: item-qty errors are default scope only; shipments scope must not contain PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT
Failure_Signals: PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT present in shipments-scoped result (ruleSet bleed — the PR #110 regression); schema rejects ruleSet arg; itemsCount=0 after add_item (missing currencyCode/cultureName)

Title: xCart — validationErrors(ruleSet:*) wildcard returns union including PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. wildcard ruleSet:"*" must return all errors across all rule sets (union). add qty=1568 over-stock line; query cart.validationErrors(ruleSet:"*") must include PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT (visible in ruleSet:default). LINE_ITEM_ID via follow-up cart query.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=get_line_id] errors[] empty
[DATA label=get_line_id] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=change_to_overstock] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_wildcard_ruleset] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_wildcard_ruleset] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[COUNT label=read_wildcard_ruleset] data.cart.validationErrors.length >= 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] wildcard ruleSet must be superset of default — any error visible in ruleSet:default must also appear in ruleSet:*
Failure_Signals: wildcard returns empty when default is non-empty (union broken); PRODUCT_QTY_INSUFFICIENT missing from wildcard result; ruleSet:* schema arg rejected; itemsCount=0 after add_item (missing currencyCode/cultureName)

Title: xCart — stale validation errors cleared after corrective mutation (valid cart shows no errors)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. PR #110 targeted: stale errors that persist after cart becomes valid (the original motivation for the validation caching refactor). Create over-stock state, then correct it by reducing qty to 1 (within stock), then verify cart.validationErrors(ruleSet:default) is empty AND per-line isValid=true / validationErrors=[]. Guards the stale-error scenario that ClearValidationCache was meant to fix. LINE_ITEM_ID via follow-up cart query (addItem async settle).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=get_line_id] errors[] empty
[DATA label=get_line_id] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=change_to_overstock] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=correct_qty] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_after_correction] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_after_correction] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[COUNT label=read_after_correction] data.cart.validationErrors.length = 0
[DATA label=read_after_correction] data.cart.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_ID}}].quantity = 1
[DATA label=read_after_correction] data.cart.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_ID}}].isValid = true
[COUNT label=read_after_correction] data.cart.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_ID}}].validationErrors.length = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Both cart-level and per-line errors must clear after corrective mutation — guards stale-error scenario PR #110 aimed to fix
Failure_Signals: cart.validationErrors non-empty after correction (stale error not cleared); per-line isValid=false after valid qty restored; per-line validationErrors non-empty after correction; itemsCount=0 after add_item (missing currencyCode/cultureName)
